---
title: "Photography"
---

Photography is a passion that I've been cultivating over the past decade. To me, the camera is a tool for being present in the moment and mindful of the beauty in the world. As a trained biologist, my photography is principally inspired by the wonders of nature. Though I don't shy from seeking interesting compositions and textures in the built environment 😉

See below some galleries by category. I also post a [monthly photo blog](https://eisen-raph.com/). If you come across an image that speaks to you and would like to purchase a print, feel free to visit the [shop](https://eisen-raph.com/Shop.html) or [reach out to me directly](https://eisen-raph.com/About.html).

###
